# services.monero

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.monero`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.monero.banlist` | `null or absolute path` | Path to a text file containing IPs to block. Useful to prevent DDoS/deanonymization attacks. <https://github.com/monero-project/meta/issues/1124> |
| `services.monero.dataDir` | `string` | The directory where Monero stores its data files. |
| `services.monero.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Monero node daemon. |
| `services.monero.environmentFile` | `null or absolute path` | Path to an EnvironmentFile for the monero service as defined in {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. Secrets may be passed to the service by specifying placeholder variables in the Nix config and setting values in the environment file. Example: `# In environment file: MINING_ADDRESS=888tNkZrPN6JsEgekjMnABU4TBzc2Dt29EPAvkRxbANsAnjyPbb3iQ1YBRk1UXcdRsiKc9dhwMVgN5S9cQUiyoogDavup3H` `# Service config services.monero.mining.address = "$MINING_ADDRESS";` |
| `services.monero.exclusiveNodes` | `list of string` | List of peer IP addresses to connect to *only*. If given the other peer options will be ignored. |
| `services.monero.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Extra lines to be added verbatim to monerod configuration. |
| `services.monero.extraNodes` | `list of string` | List of additional peer IP addresses to add to the local list. |
| `services.monero.limits.download` | `signed integer` | Limit of the download rate in kB/s. Set to `-1` to leave unlimited. |
| `services.monero.limits.syncSize` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum number of blocks to sync at once. Set to `0` for adaptive. |
| `services.monero.limits.threads` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Maximum number of threads used for a parallel job. Set to `0` to leave unlimited. |
| `services.monero.limits.upload` | `signed integer` | Limit of the upload rate in kB/s. Set to `-1` to leave unlimited. |
| `services.monero.mining.address` | `string` | Monero address where to send mining rewards. |
| `services.monero.mining.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to mine monero. |
| `services.monero.mining.threads` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Number of threads used for mining. Set to `0` to use all available. |
| `services.monero.priorityNodes` | `list of string` | List of peer IP addresses to connect to and attempt to keep the connection open. |
| `services.monero.prune` | `boolean` | Whether to prune the blockchain. <https://www.getmonero.org/resources/moneropedia/pruning.html> |
| `services.monero.rpc.address` | `string` | IP address the RPC server will bind to. |
| `services.monero.rpc.password` | `null or string` | Password for RPC connections. |
| `services.monero.rpc.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Port the RPC server will bind to. |
| `services.monero.rpc.restricted` | `boolean` | Whether to restrict RPC to view only commands. |
| `services.monero.rpc.user` | `null or string` | User name for RPC connections. |
